ignoreNote: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
magicLink.subject: Your Seazn Club sign-in link
magicLink.preheader: Your one-time sign-in link — expires in 15 minutes.
magicLink.title: Sign in to Seazn Club
magicLink.body: Click the button below to sign in. This link expires in 15 minutes and can be used once.
magicLink.text: Sign in to Seazn Club (expires in 15 minutes): {link}
passwordReset.subject: Reset your Seazn Club password
passwordReset.preheader: Your reset link is inside — it expires in 1 hour.
passwordReset.title: Reset your password
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset your Seazn Club password. This link expires in 1 hour.
verification.subject: Verify your Seazn Club account
verification.preheader: One click to verify your email and finish setting up your account.
verification.title: Confirm your email
verification.body: Thanks for signing up. Click the button below to verify your email and finish setting up your account.
verification.footer: You received this because this address was used to sign up for Seazn Club.
emailChangeConfirm.subject: Confirm your new email address — Seazn Club
emailChangeConfirm.preheader: Confirm this address to complete your email change — expires in 24 hours.
emailChangeConfirm.title: Confirm your new email
emailChangeConfirm.body: You requested a change to your email address. Click below to confirm. This link expires in 24 hours.
emailChangeConfirm.text: Confirm your new email address (expires in 24 hours): {link}
emailChangeNotice.subject: Your Seazn Club email address is being changed
emailChangeNotice.preheader: A change to your account email was requested — review if this wasn't you.
emailChangeNotice.title: Email change requested
emailChangeNotice.body: Someone requested a change to the email address on your account to {newEmail}. The change will take effect once the new address is confirmed. If this wasn't you, contact support immediately.
emailChangeNotice.footer: This notice was sent to the address currently on your account.
emailChangeNotice.text: Your account email is being changed to {newEmail}. If this wasn't you, contact support.
accountDeletion.subject: Your Seazn Club account has been deleted
accountDeletion.preheader: Your account and data are scheduled for permanent deletion within 30 days.
accountDeletion.title: Your account has been deleted
accountDeletion.body: Your Seazn Club account and associated data have been scheduled for permanent deletion within 30 days. If this wasn't you, contact support immediately.
accountDeletion.footer: This is the last email we'll send to this address.
accountDeletion.text: Your Seazn Club account has been deleted. Data will be erased within 30 days.
invite.subject: You've been invited to join {orgName} on Seazn Club
invite.preheader: Accept your invite to {orgName} and get involved.
invite.title: You're invited
invite.body: You've been invited to join {orgName} on Seazn Club. Click below to accept.
invite.footer: You received this because an organiser at {orgName} invited this address.
invite.text: You've been invited to join {orgName}. Accept: {link}
claimInvite.subject: Claim your player profile at {orgName}
claimInvite.preheader: See your matches, tell organisers when you can play, and control what's public.
claimInvite.title: Claim your player profile
claimInvite.body: An organiser at {orgName} set up a player profile for {personName}. Claim it to see all your matches in one place, RSVP your availability, and control what appears publicly.
claimInvite.footer: You received this because an organiser at {orgName} invited this address. Not you? Just ignore this email.
funnelClaim.subject: “{competitionName}” is ready to finish setting up
funnelClaim.preheader: One click creates your competition and takes you inside.
funnelClaim.title: {competitionName} is one click away
funnelClaim.body: Your {sport} competition is drafted and waiting. Click below to create it and land straight on the entrant list — no password needed, this link signs you in.
funnelClaim.footer: The link works once and expires in 7 days. If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore it.
funnelClaim.text: Finish setting up “{competitionName}” (link works once, expires in 7 days): {link}
funnelReminder.subject: Still planning “{competitionName}”?
funnelReminder.preheader: Your drafted competition expires in a few days.
funnelReminder.title: Your competition is still waiting
funnelReminder.body: You drafted “{competitionName}” ({sport}) yesterday but haven't finished setting it up. One click signs you in and creates it.
funnelReminder.footer: This is the only reminder we'll send — the draft expires 7 days after it was created.
refundIssued.subject: Refund issued — {competitionName}
refundIssued.preheader: {amount} is on its way back to your card.
refundIssued.title: Refund issued
refundIssued.body: Hi {displayName} — a refund of {amount} for your {competitionName} entry has been issued.
refundIssued.panelBody: Refunds usually reach the original card within 5–10 business days, depending on your bank.
refundIssued.footer: You received this because this address was used to enter {competitionName} at {orgName}.
refundIssued.textAmount: Amount: {amount}. Refunds usually reach the original card within 5–10 business days.
disputeAlert.subject: Payment dispute opened — {competitionName}
disputeAlert.preheader: {amount} entry-fee payment disputed — action may be needed.
disputeAlert.title: Payment dispute opened
disputeAlert.body: The {amount} entry-fee payment from {displayName}{ref} for {competitionName} has been disputed by the cardholder.
disputeAlert.panelBody: The registration is flagged on your console. If the dispute is lost, the cardholder is repaid and the amount is recovered from your Stripe balance. Check the entry, and gather anything that proves the registration was genuine (the confirmation email, check-in records).
disputeAlert.footer: You received this because you own the organisation on seazn.club.
disputeAlert.textNext: The registration is flagged on your console. If the dispute is lost, the cardholder is repaid and the amount is recovered from your Stripe balance.
disputeLost.subject: Dispute lost — {competitionName}
disputeLost.title: Dispute lost
disputeLost.body: The {amount} entry-fee dispute from {displayName}{ref} for {competitionName} was closed in the cardholder's favour. The cardholder has been repaid by Stripe and the entry is marked refunded on your console.
disputeLost.recovered: {recovered} has been recovered from your Stripe balance — if your balance can't cover it, Stripe deducts it from your upcoming payouts. Seazn Club covered Stripe's dispute fee.
disputeLost.notRecovered: We could not automatically recover the amount from your Stripe balance — our team will follow up. Seazn Club covered Stripe's dispute fee.
disputeLost.footer: You received this because you own the organisation on seazn.club.
disputeLost.textRepaid: The cardholder has been repaid by Stripe and the entry is marked refunded.
disputeLost.textRecovered: {recovered} has been recovered from your Stripe balance; Seazn Club covered Stripe's dispute fee.
disputeLost.textNotRecovered: We could not automatically recover the amount from your Stripe balance — our team will follow up. Seazn Club covered Stripe's dispute fee.
registration.subject: Registration received — {competitionName}
registration.preheaderWaitlist: You're on the waitlist for {competitionName} — we'll be in touch.
registration.preheaderPaid: Your entry for {competitionName} is in — payment details inside.
registration.title: Registration received
registration.introWaitlist: You're on the waitlist for {competitionName}. We'll be in touch if a place opens up.
registration.intro: Thanks {displayName} — your registration for {competitionName} has been received.
registration.refPanelBody: Quote it to the organiser or look yourself up on the day.
registration.refPanelBodyAt: Quote it to the organiser or look yourself up on the day at {url}.
registration.feeHeldUntil: Your spot is held until {deadline} — complete payment to confirm it.
registration.feeHeld: Your spot is held — complete payment to confirm it.
registration.feeContactOrganiser: Entry fee: {amount}. The organiser will contact you with payment details.
registration.footer: You received this because this address was used to enter {competitionName} at {orgName}.
registration.textHeldUntil: Your spot is held until {deadline} — pay to confirm it:
registration.textHeld: Your spot is held — pay to confirm it:
registration.textFeeContactOrganiser: Entry fee: {amount}. The organiser will contact you with payment details.
paymentReminder.subject: Payment reminder — {competitionName}
paymentReminder.preheader: Your {amount} entry fee for {competitionName} is still due.
paymentReminder.title: Entry fee still due
paymentReminder.body: Hi {displayName}, your entry for {competitionName} is confirmed once the {amount} entry fee is received.
paymentReminder.completeHeldUntil: Your spot is held until {deadline} — after that it's offered to the next in line.
paymentReminder.completeHeld: Your spot is held — after that it's offered to the next in line.
paymentReminder.footer: If you've already paid, please ignore this — it can take the organiser a little time to reconcile.
paymentReminder.textHeldUntil: Your spot is held until {deadline} — pay here:
paymentReminder.textHeld: Your spot is held — pay here:
paymentReminder.textContactOrg: Please contact the organiser to arrange payment.
paymentReminder.textAlreadyPaid: If you've already paid, please ignore this.
registrationPromoted.subject: A spot opened up — {competitionName}
registrationPromoted.preheaderPay: You're off the waitlist for {competitionName} — pay by {deadline}.
registrationPromoted.title: You're off the waitlist
registrationPromoted.intro: Good news, {displayName} — a place opened up in {competitionName} and it's yours.
registrationPromoted.feeHeldUntil: Your spot is held until {deadline} — complete payment to confirm it. Miss the window and the next person in line is offered the place.
registrationPromoted.feeHeld: Your spot is held — complete payment to confirm it. Miss the window and the next person in line is offered the place.
registrationPromoted.contactOrganiser: The organiser will contact you with payment details.
registrationPromoted.noPayment: No payment is needed — the organiser will confirm your entry.
registrationPromoted.reference: Your reference is {refCode} — check your status any time at {url}.
registrationPromoted.footer: You received this because this address was used to enter {competitionName} at {orgName}.
registrationPromoted.textHeldUntil: Your spot is held until {deadline} — pay to confirm it:
registrationPromoted.textHeld: Your spot is held — pay to confirm it:
sponsorInvoice.subject: Sponsorship invoice — {orgName}
sponsorInvoice.title: Sponsorship invoice
sponsorInvoice.body: Hi {sponsorName} — {orgName} has set up your {packageName} sponsorship. Pay {amount} by card to activate your placement.
sponsorInvoice.panelBody: As soon as payment completes, your logo and link go live on the competition's public pages.
sponsorInvoice.footer: You received this because {orgName} entered this address for a sponsorship package.
sponsorInvoice.textAmount: Amount: {amount}. Pay by card at the link below.
sponsorReceipt.subject: Sponsorship receipt — {orgName}
sponsorReceipt.title: Sponsorship confirmed
sponsorReceipt.body: Thanks {sponsorName} — your payment of {amount} for the {packageName} package at {orgName} is confirmed.
sponsorReceipt.panelBody: Your logo and link now appear on the competition's public pages, the registration page and the venue slideshow.
sponsorReceipt.footer: You received this because this address paid for a sponsorship at {orgName}.
sponsorReceipt.textAmount: Amount paid: {amount}. Your placement is live.
sponsorRefund.subject: Sponsorship refunded — {orgName}
sponsorRefund.preheader: {amount} is on its way back to your card.
sponsorRefund.title: Sponsorship refunded
sponsorRefund.body: Hi {sponsorName} — your payment of {amount} for the {packageName} package at {orgName} has been refunded, and the placement has been taken off the public pages.
sponsorRefund.panelBody: Refunds usually reach the original card within 5–10 business days, depending on your bank.
sponsorRefund.footer: You received this because this address paid for a sponsorship at {orgName}.
sponsorRefund.textAmount: Amount: {amount}. Refunds usually reach the original card within 5–10 business days.
